items.text_it: Trump propone di sospendere l'imposta federale sul gas fino a quando i prezzi non scenderanno
items.summary_it: Il Congresso avrebbe dovuto accettare qualsiasi sospensione e la riduzione delle tasse federali non avrebbe compensato il forte aumento dei prezzi dall'inizio della guerra.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: RFK Jr. Is Driving a Vast Inquiry Into Vaccines, Despite His Public Silence
items.summary: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has toned down his public criticism of vaccines, under orders from the White House. But inside his department, a sprawling research effort is a top priority.
items.text_it: RFK Jr. sta conducendo una vasta indagine sui vaccini, nonostante il suo silenzio pubblico
items.summary_it: Il segretario alla salute Robert F. Kennedy Jr. ha attenuato le sue critiche pubbliche sui vaccini, su ordine della Casa Bianca. Ma all'interno del suo dipartimento, uno sforzo di ricerca tentacolare è una priorità assoluta.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: First-Time Home Buyers Are Staying on the Sidelines as Costs Rise
items.summary: The effects of the war in Iran have raised mortgage rates and lowered consumer confidence, making it even harder for house hunters.

items.author: NYT Business
items.text: How the U.S. Is Trying to Ensure the Dollar’s Dominance During Economic Turmoil
items.summary: As the government has been devising plans to keep the dollar dominant, China has been making its own moves to increase global influence of the renminbi.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Kevin Warsh is right about Fed reform — but his inflation solution is a trap
items.summary: Warsh’s belief that AI is a guaranteed disinflationary force could trigger premature rate cuts.
items.text_it: Kevin Warsh ha ragione sulla riforma della Fed, ma la sua soluzione per l'inflazione è una trappola
items.summary_it: La convinzione di Warsh che l'IA sia una forza disinflazionistica garantita potrebbe innescare tagli prematuri dei tassi.

items.author: MarketWatch
items.text: Powell’s legacy as Fed chair is fighting inflation and Trump. He may lose the battle against both.
items.summary: Jerome Powell will be remembered for how the struggles against inflation and to preserve Federal Reserve independence ultimately end.
